description: description
responsibilities: What You’ll Do Collaborate with client facing teams to understand solution context and contribute in technical requirement gathering and analysis Design and implement technical features leveraging best practices for technology stack being used Work with technical architects on the team to validate design and implementation approach Write production-ready code that is easily testable, understood by other developers and accounts for edge cases and errors Ensure highest quality of deliverables by following architecture/design guidelines, coding best practices, periodic design/code reviews Write unit tests as well as higher level tests to handle expected edge cases and errors gracefully, as well as happy paths Uses bug tracking, code review, version control and other tools to organize and deliver work Participate in scrum calls and agile ceremonies, and effectively communicate work progress, issues and dependencies Consistently contribute in researching & evaluating latest technologies through rapid learning, conducting proof-of-concepts and creating prototype solutions What You’ll Bring 2+ years of relevant hands-on experience CS foundation is must Strong command over distributed computing framework like Spark (preferred) or others. Strong analytical / problems solving Ability to quickly learn and become hands on new technology and be innovative in creating solutions Strong in at least one of the Programming languages - Python or Java, Scala, etc. and Programming basics - Data Structures Hands on experience in building modules for data management solutions such as data pipeline, orchestration, ingestion patterns (batch, real time) Experience in designing and implementation of solution on distributed computing and cloud services platform (but not limited to) - AWS, Azure, GCP Good understanding of RDBMS, with some exp on ETL is preferred Additional Skills: Understanding of DevOps, CI / CD, data security, experience in designing on cloud platform AWS Solutions Architect certification with understanding of broader AWS stack Knowledge of data modeling and data warehouse concepts Willingness to travel to other global offices as needed to work with client or other internal project team

description: description
responsibilities: What You’ll Do • Develop and execute automated test scripts to validate software functionality, performance, reliability, and data accuracy across ETL and data warehousing pipelines. • Work closely with Test Consultants and Associate Consultants to contribute to the design and implementation of automation frameworks, including ETL and data validation frameworks. • Perform end-to-end ETL Testing, ensuring correctness of data extraction, transformation logic, loading processes, and reconciliation. • Validate data flows, perform source-to-target mapping verification, and ensure data integrity across databases, APIs, and reporting layers. • Assist in maintaining and enhancing existing automation frameworks by integrating new test cases (including SQL-based validation scripts) and improving script efficiency. • Execute test cases, maintain automation scripts, report defects, and perform root-cause analysis for both application-level and data-level issues. • Work on functional testing, regression testing, and system testing to ensure all features behave as expected across UI, API, and backend systems. • Collaborate with QA, development, data engineering, and product teams to understand testing requirements and create reusable automation test suites. • Debug and troubleshoot automation scripts, ETL jobs, and data issues, ensuring smooth execution of automated and data validation test cases. • Ensure test scripts align with business requirements and maintain comprehensive functional, data, and automation coverage. • Document and report test results, defects, data discrepancies, and issues—providing clear SQL queries and repro steps where required. • Work with tools such as Selenium, Cucumber, Appium, TestNG, JUnit, as well as ETL tools and SQL scripting frameworks. • Support CI/CD pipelines by integrating automation and data validation test suites. • Ensure regression testing covers both UI/API functionality and data/ETL processes. • Follow industry best practices and maintain compliance with testing standards. • Should be well-versed with GenAI concepts and incorporate GenAI-based accelerators into functional, automation, and data testing processes. • Develop automation scripts using Python (preferred) or Java. • Work closely with data engineers to validate data models, transformations, and performance of large-volume data loads. What You’ll Bring Bachelor's/master's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering or other computer-related disciplines with minimum 60% marks throughout the education; 3.5-6 years of software testing experience in business intelligence domain Experience with end-to-end testing of the ETL process of a data warehouse system; Experience in one or more Big data technologies: Spark Databricks Redshift Azure Informatica cloud GCP Athena etc; Experience with DevOps/CICD/Jenkins will be an added advantage; Hands on experience with reporting and web based application testing will be an added advantage; Hands on experience in one or more automation technologies: Selenium+Java/Python Selenium IDE testproject.IO Python shell scripting VBA will be an added advantage; Experience in developing test plans, as well as translating them into test cases and executing them; In-depth understanding of defect management processes; SQL skills for development of expected results and troubleshooting problems found during testing; Identify test data requirements and generate required data to support testing; Evaluate and analyze application behavior and data for potential software issues; Experience with validated systems will be good to have. Additional Skills: Must be technical, creative, detail-oriented and a strong team player. ZS is a global consulting firm; English fluency is required, additional fluency in at least one European or Asian language is highly desired. Candidates must possess work authorization for their intended country of employment. An on-line application, including a cover letter expressing interest and a full set of transcripts (official or unofficial), is required to be considered

description: description
responsibilities: We are seeking a Visual Designer (Associate) to join our Creative & Communications team. In this role, you will contribute to creating clear, concept-driven visual communication across formats and mediums - translating complex ideas into structured, engaging, and user-centric design solutions. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to understand requirements and develop outputs that align with brand systems, communication goals, and user needs. A strong focus on design craft, attention to detail, and consistency in execution is essential, along with a solid foundation in layout, typography, and information hierarchy. This role offers the opportunity to work across diverse projects while strengthening your approach to visual storytelling, system thinking, and high-quality execution within a collaborative and evolving design environment. What You’ll Do:   Design & Execution Develop visually compelling and conceptually rich communication across formats, including campaigns, visual narratives, and communication assets Create high-quality layouts, graphics, and visual systems for print and digital collaterals Translate complex information into clear, engaging, and well-structured visual outputs Apply strong design craft - typography, color, composition, and attention to detail - to ensure polished and consistent work. Collaboration & Delivery Work closely with internal, business and project teams to align on objectives, messaging, and visual direction Work on multiple projects with a focus on quality, timelines, and consistency Contribute to a collaborative workflow, ensuring smooth coordination and alignment. Growth & Innovation Stay updated on design trends, tools, and best practices Contribute ideas to enhance visual storytelling and communication approaches Leverage new technologies and tools to propose innovative solutions. What You’ll Bring:   ≥2 years of professional experience in visual design, preferably in a creative agency or design studio Bachelor’s degree preferred in graphic design, visual arts, or a related field Proficiency in design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and Microsoft Office Suite (PowerPoint, Word) Solid understanding of typography, color theory, and design principles Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams Attention to detail and a passion for delivering high-quality work Curiosity about Generative AI and emerging design tech. Good to Have Basic skills in motion graphics/video editing (After Effects, Premiere Pro) Familiarity with web/UI tools (Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, Framer) Experience with Google Slides, Sites, and other G Suite tools. Portfolio Requirement [ Must Included in Resume] Strong portfolio (at least 3–5 pieces) demonstrating conceptual thinking and execution across various mediums. What Success Looks Like Ability to take design projects from brief to final delivery with minimal supervision Deliver clean, well-structured handoffs and maintain efficient workflows Collaborate effectively as a proactive and dependable team player Maintain structured project management, including proper file and folder naming and organization. What You'll Bring Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: Delivery Excellence Specialist As a Delivery Excellence Specialist at ZS Associates, you will be responsible for driving delivery excellence by ensuring that delivery processes are executed with precision, consistency, and alignment to organizational standards. You will provide strategic and technical guidance to delivery teams, enabling them to implement and sustain high-performing controls and practices that support delivery efficiency and continuous improvement. By collaborating with key stakeholders—including Delivery Managers and Leaders - you will help deliver a comprehensive view of delivery health, performance metrics, and their impact on business outcomes. Your advanced knowledge of delivery management principles and project execution will empower you to lead innovative initiatives, optimize delivery frameworks, and manage a diverse team in a dynamic and evolving technology landscape. What You'll Do: Delivery Excellence Specialist in the Enterprise will… Work closely with delivery teams to embed best practices in delivery excellence, risk management, ensuring successful outcomes for aligned programs Track and report operational KPIs to support data-driven decision-making. Monitor delivery performance metrics and escalate issues to ensure timely resolution Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive continuous improvement in delivery practices. Conduct process reviews and identify inefficiencies, recommending actionable improvements. Assist in designing and implementing process improvement initiatives using Lean, Six Sigma, or Agile methodologies. Identify operational bottlenecks and support initiatives to enhance efficiency and effectiveness. Participate in change management initiatives by supporting communication, training, and stakeholder engagement activities. Help assess the impact of changes and gather feedback to refine implementation strategies. Promote adoption of new tools, processes, and systems across teams. Perform periodic project audits / reviews for the project delivery process based on CMMI (Capability Maturity Model Integration) process areas and report non compliances, best practices followed Assist in Delivery Risk governance and work closely with QRM Leads ensuring effective risk management and mitigation throughout lifecycle of projects Conduct trainings on Delivery Excellence focus areas, QMS process assets and awareness on best practices Maintain and ensure project process maturity (CMMI Level 3) adherence for ensuring Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI) v3.0 Development & Services appraisal and accreditation process Showcase expertise on Software Quality Management framework such as ISO9001, CMMI Development, CMMI Services and focus on performance and continuous improvement at project as well as organization level Enhance Delivery and Operations maturity through close engagement and planned intervention across all project phases Definition and regular enhancement of enterprise level Quality Management System aka Enterprise Delivery Framework (EDF) supporting Development (Waterfall, Agile) as well as Operations projects (Services delivery methodology. What You'll Bring: Bachelor's degree in IT or relevant field with a strong academic record. A minimum of 7-10 years of experience in Delivery Excellence and Quality Management Strong communication & strategic influencing skills. Relevant experience working with senior leaders, building internal networks, and delivering high impact programs in complex -matrixed environments. Formal training or certification in Delivery/Operations excellence, and/or 5+ years of experience or equivalent expertise in technology Delivery excellence management, Operations excellence, Software Quality Management & Software Quality Standards or related field. Familiarity with delivery excellence frameworks, industry standards, and pharma regulatory requirements (HIPPA, GXP etc) Proficient knowledge and expertise in data security, risk assessment & reporting, control evaluation, design, and governance, with a proven record of implementing effective risk mitigation strategies. Proficient in MS Office productivity suite (e.g., Word, Excel, PowerPoint, SharePoint). Advanced Excel skills strongly preferred Six Sigma Black Belt/ITIL/CMMI/ISO9001 Lead auditor/MBA or relevant Delivery excellence / Audit certification Experience with Project management tools (e.g., Atlassian JIRA, Confluence, MS Project) and Quality Assurance tools CMMI implementation experience (Maturity level 3 at minimum/ High maturity implementation experience preferred ) Willingness to adapt to evolving industry standards and technologies Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: Media and Analyst Relations Associate Consultant Imagine shaping how a global consulting and tech firm is seen across India. Turning stories into headlines, building connections with media, and making our leaders the go-to voices in tech. Join our Marketing & Communications team in Gurugram as we strengthen our position as a global tech partner and employer of choice in the India region. What you'll do: Media and Analyst Relations Associate Consultant in the Enterprise will… Craft and execute media strategies: Plan, organize, and execute a comprehensive media strategy for the India region Create compelling content: Write press releases, thought leadership opinion pieces, media interview briefs, and reactive statements for external and internal use Drive PR campaigns: Partner with external agencies and internal leaders to run high-impact initiatives Build media connections: Forge lasting relationship with media and analyst, handle their queries, and keep our story front and center Measure and optimize impact: Track and report on the effectiveness of media and analyst relations strategies, using metrics and KPIs to assess impact and alignment with strategic goals Stay ahead of the curve: Monitor competitor’s news and spot opportunities to outpace them Prepare for anything: Develop crisis management plan in case of any negative fallout affecting the firm's image Industry awards: Lead awards submissions and amplify wins to elevate ZS across India What you'll bring: Minimum bachelor’s degree in communication, journalism or related field; master’s degree (MA/MS/MBA) preferred 6+ years in media relations at a multinational firm, with hands-on wins in PR campaigns Excellent writing, editing and verbal communications skills Demonstrated ability to manage internal client relationships, including senior leaders Proven record in managing public relations programs that achieve results Ability to lead multiple projects simultaneously with strong prioritization skills Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and a passion for delivering top-quality work Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: About the Expertise Centre – R&D Technologist The R&D Technologist Expertise Centre within ZS’s Drug Development practice partners with biopharma organizations to design and deliver innovative clinical data solutions that accelerate drug development and reduce risk from portfolio to patient. The team operates at the intersection of key ZS drug development verticals—including asset strategy, clinical trial design, clinical data management, statistical programming, regulatory, and risk-based quality. By combining deep clinical domain expertise, data standards, clinical programming, systems understanding, and consulting discipline, the team solves complex R&D challenges with speed, scale, and measurable impact. Director Expertise Center R&D Technologist – Clinical data solutions The Director – R&D Technologist (Clinical Data Solutions) provides strategic and scientific leadership across clinical data management, analytics, biostatistics, statistical programming, and clinical data standards. This role is central to the R&D Technologist Expertise Centre and focuses on designing and delivering innovative clinical data solutions across the drug development lifecycle—with a strong emphasis on clinical data standards, transformation, and analytics-driven decision-making. You will combine deep technical expertise, consulting leadership, and practice-building capabilities to serve as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders, driving next-generation clinical data and analytics solutions that improve development outcomes and accelerate regulatory submissions What You’ll Do: Strategic & Client Leadership Provide strategic leadership across clinical data management, biometrics, and advanced analytics for end-to-end drug development programs Serve as ZS’s go-to leader for clinical data solutions, bringing a strong techno-functional perspective across clinical data flow and systems Lead complex client engagements spanning clinical data strategy, analytics enablement, and digital R&D transformation Facilitate senior-level workshops to align stakeholders on study design, data standards, analytics approaches, and operating models Clinical Data & Standards Leadership Bring deep expertise in clinical data standards (e.g., CDISC – CDASH, SDTM, ADaM, TLF) Define innovative approaches to clinical data collection, transformation, and analytics Integrate clinical programming, analytics, and data science into trial design, execution, and regulatory workflows Drive adoption of standardized, scalable, and future-ready clinical data models Technology & Innovation Apply a techno-functional lens across clinical systems, data platforms, and enterprise architectures Leverage AI/ML and GenAI approaches to transform clinical data processing and analytics Define future-state operating models and digital ecosystems for clinical data and analytics Delivery Excellence & Governance Oversee quality, scientific rigor, and compliance of deliverables, including analytics, data models, and regulatory outputs Ensure alignment with GxP standards, regulatory expectations, and industry best practices Act as a bridge between scientific, business, and engineering teams Team & Practice Building Lead and grow a high-performing clinical data and analytics team Mentor senior talent and establish standards for delivery excellence Contribute to capability building, accelerators, and new offerings within the Expertise Centre Support business development through solutioning, client pursuits, and long-term relationship building
qualifications: What you’ll bring: Experience & Domain Expertise 18+ years of experience in Life Sciences R&D, with strong expertise in clinical data management, biometrics, and analytics Deep understanding of the end-to-end drug development lifecycle Strong domain knowledge of clinical data, analytics, and digital R&D transformation Clinical Systems & Platforms Experience working with: EDC Platforms: Medidata Rave, Veeva EDC, Oracle InForm Clinical Systems: ePRO, laboratory systems, CTMS, eTMF, CDMS Clinical Data Repositories: SAS LSAF, Oracle LSH, eClinical Elluminate Metadata Repositories: Nurocor, Sycamore, Formedix Statistical Computing: SAS, SAS Viya, Domino Data Standards & Interoperability Strong expertise in: CDISC: CDASH, SDTM, ADaM, TLF Interoperability: FHIR, HL7, USDM Technical & Analytical Skills Working knowledge of R, Python, and SAS for clinical data transformation and analysis Exposure to AI/ML and GenAI-based solutions in clinical data and analytics Strong capability in business process modeling, data flow modeling, and solution architecture design Leadership & Consulting Skills Strong communication and stakeholder management skills with ability to influence senior leaders Proven experience in GxP-compliant, large-scale enterprise programs Ability to lead global, cross-functional, and multi-vendor teams Strong leadership, mentoring, and team-building capabilities Solid understanding of agile, product-led, and digital transformation delivery models

description: description
responsibilities: What You’ll Do: Develop complex solutions for clients using programming languages, ETL service platforms, cloud technologies, and other relevant tools. Take complete ownership of activities and responsibilities across all phases of the project lifecycle, effectively addressing business problems across multiple client engagements. Exceptional verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to clearly articulate results and issues to both internal and client teams. Ability to collaborate effectively within a virtual global team environment, contributing to the timely delivery of multiple projects. description: description
responsibilities: What you'll do: Senior Associate - ITAM in the Enterprise will be responsible for providing supports to all global users on their software needs. Primarily handles software asset management activities like creating, updating, tracking, monitoring, and maintaining software licenses in software management database, as well as monitoring application usage, and reporting compliance of software usage. IT Program associate works with different vendor to get the quote, review them internally and post approval process them for procurement. Working on opportunities to target unused or restricted software for re-harvest/redeployment. Person is responsible for tracking, Maintaining, and auditing the software records on periodic basis. Review new software requests for accuracy and adherence to standards and policies Responsible for collecting the information from end users and coordinating with additional support team to review the software needs. Initial assessment, research, and resolution of basic incidents and requests regarding use of software and components. Work with requestors on alternative options, and ensure the necessary data is captured for compliance, procurement. Escalate compliance matters, standards or policy deviations, and other software related issues to internal escalation teams Compile and maintain inventory of company software and systems assets for the purpose of tracking their corresponding licenses. Administer license change management and license closure. Utilization of the Inventory Tools/ Central repository for optimized use of software licenses / re-harvest or redeployment Ensures the end-to-end user experience and acts as a single point-of-contact for the end user. Periodic review of SaaS / critical tools to ensure that they are compliant with terms of usages Assignation of licenses or removal for various tools. Supporting various IT functions for operational support. Prepare of various reporting ranging from software status to financial spends Responds to requests from managers, and team members, for specific Programs Other duties as assigned.
qualifications: What you’ll bring: Possess Bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, or business administration, or in another related field 2 to 4 years of experience in software asset management Ability to translate licensing terms and conditions in License agreements Strong knowledge of contract, licensing, and data privacy regulations/laws and best practices Strong communication, interpersonal, team oriented, organizational, and service mindset. Proactively identify cost savings opportunities relating to software and software maintenance Strong end user service skills Self-motivated, goal oriented, and an innovative thinker Ability to work both independently and in a team-oriented, collaborative environment. Familiar with Microsoft O365 tools Able to prepare the reports in tools like excel. Must be able to handle multiple tasks and ensure proper follow up is maintained SAM certified professional will be a value add. Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach

description: description
responsibilities: ZS’s Digital and Technology group focuses on driving end to end Digital Transformation that includes Digital Strategy, Human centered Design, exploiting emerging technologies, and purposeful change management to improve customer and company results. The types of solutions include Digital Strategy and Advisory services, end to end Transformation Management, Enterprise Data, Analytics and AI, Intelligent Automation, reimagining business processes with digital first lens and building Digital Products, Solutions and Digital Platforms leveraging Big Data Technologies, AI/ML and Advance Analytics, Digital Platform configuration and integrations. We provide a complete spectrum of technology solutions, from strategy and roadmap definition to full scale implementation and on-going operations. Our team possesses deep expertise in leading digital transformation, enterprise data analytic and AI, Data science and advanced analytics and building end to end digital. Manager- Enterprise Architect in Tech and Cloud Advisory ZS's Technology Advisory Group ensures our future information, technology and architectural landscape is built to plan and evolve as our business grows, striving to balance future-proofing our end-to-end technology stack while accelerating the speed of innovation and streamlining the delivery of business capability. This role will be responsible for supporting the growth and development of our Technology Advisory Practice within the ZS Technology Services business.   The successful candidate will work closely with ZS practice leadership and be responsible for evolving our practice, enriching our practice assets and collaterals, building, and managing client relationships, generating new business engagements, and providing thought leadership in the Technology and Architecture Area. What You’ll Do Design robust and scalable solutions consistent with ZS and industry practices; take advantage of the existing assets and maintaining a balance between architecture requirements and specific client needs Drive technical architecture and design discussions with internal and client groups to brainstorm and finalize technology solutions Collaborate with the Architecture & Engineering expertise centre leadership to define technology roadmap and work with delivery team to put together a plan for technical implementation with and stay on track Stay current on latest technology trends and architecture patterns, and lead the effort to develop ZS POV for strategic decision-making Engage with clients to understand their needs and provide tailored solutions. Advance ZS’ technology offerings by innovating and scaling tech assets, driving feasibility analysis to select technologies/platforms that provide the best solution Define and establish a technical strategy, standards, and guidelines in the data architecture domain Groom junior team members and maintain a culture of rapid learning and explorations to drive innovations / POCs on emerging technologies and architecture patterns Participate and support the business development activities. What You’ll Bring Bachelor's degree with specialization in Computer Science, IT or other computer related disciplines 8+ years of relevant experience in designing semantic architecture at an enterprise-scale. Strong engineering mindset to build highly available and robust architecture frameworks, technology solutions and reusable assets Expertise in one or more of initiatives like cloud strategy, IT transformation, and application portfolio assessment. Excellent communication and client engagement skills and ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. Experience in providing architecture alternatives, product evaluation and recommendations, POVs for implementation/adoption. Experience in scaling technology solutions aimed at solving complex business problems. Knowledge of all phases of solution development for large-scale solutions and experience working in agile teams with short release cycles. Strong technical team leadership, mentorship and collaboration abilities. Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approac
